stale_acknowledged.reason: test_copier_imports_at_runtime executes a subprocess that imports axm_init.adapters.copier (CopierAdapter, CopierConfig) — guards the copier adapter against import-time regressions; test_checker_imports_at_runtime executes a subprocess that imports axm_init.core.checker (CheckEngine) — guards the checker core against import-time regressions. Same subprocess shape but two disjoint import targets documenting fresh-interpreter importability for two distinct top-level modules.
